# Dira Africa Weather DePIN Network

Dira Africa is a Decentralised Physical Infrastructure Network (DePIN) that turns smartphones into a distributed weather sensing network across Kenya.

## Quick Links
- Bot: https://t.me/DiraAfricaBot
- GitHub: https://github.com/dira-africa
- Network Ledger (HCS Topic): 0.0.9544926
- Reward Token (HTS Token): 0.0.9544938

## System Architecture

1. **Farmer Node:** Farmers take geo-tagged crop reports bi-weekly. AI processes growth stages and verifies photo metadata.
2. **Data Agent Node:** Agents sync passive background barometric observations four times daily.
3. **Ledger Anchor:** The SHA-256 hash of all verified data points is anchored onto the Hedera Consensus Service (HCS).
4. **Reward Distribution:** verified reports earn Dira Climate Tokens (DIRA) minted via Hedera Token Service (HTS). 

## Reward Redemption Layers
- Day 1: Mobile Airtime (via Africa's Talking)
- Month 1: Agro-Dealer input vouchers (seed/fertilizer)
- Month 2: Dira Circle community cash pools (collaborative financing)
- Month 3-4: Safaricom Daraja M-Pesa cashout payments (flag-gated)

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: Next.js 14 (App Router), Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Fastify 4, PostgreSQL 16 + PostGIS, Redis 7, BullMQ
- Blockchain: Hedera Consensus & Token Services
